task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to Project Helios — Looking Forward to Partnering with Meridian Group

Dear Priya,

It is a pleasure to welcome you and Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. We are delighted to begin this partnership and support your team’s work on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path through UAT.

Project Helios is NovaBridge’s data integration platform, purpose-built to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. We designed it with the visibility, control, and performance that teams like yours need from day one, and we are confident it will serve Meridian well.

To get started, we will send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps we discussed:

1. Please share Meridian’s IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (target: 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We will aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, feel free to contact me directly. Either of us is happy to help.

Please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions. We look forward to a successful collaboration with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text: The draft welcome email has been reviewed and improved for a more personalized, professional tone, then saved back to `client_onboarding_email_draft.txt`.
